titleStmt.title: SII 26.232: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 232. (A.R. No. 220 of 1909.) KAṆṆĀḌIPUTTŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the Kaliyuga-Varadarāja-Perumāḷ temple in the village.

p.hi: Trībhº Kōṉēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ: Vikramachōḷadēva (?) Year 3, 257th day = 1276 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records an order of the king confirming as iṟaiyili, a piece of land which was situated at Śōḻamādēvinallūr in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu and was originally granted as iṟaiyili by Sundarapāṇḍya to the temple of the god Śokkanārāyaṇapperumāḷ at Kaṇṇāḍipputtūr alias Vīrapāṇḍyachchuturvēdimaṅgalam in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu. The order is addressed to the Nambiyār and the Śrī-Vaiṭṭinavar of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakkaravatti koneriṉmaiko
ṇṭāṉ karaivaḻināṭṭu kaṇṇāṭipputtūrāṉa
virapāṇṭiyac caturvvedimaṅkalattu nāyanār co
kkanārāyaṇapperumāḷ koyi
lil nampiyārum tiruppati śrī vaiṭṭinavarkaḷukkum
Innāyanāṟkku Innāṭṭu coḻamātevinal
lūril Aiyyaṉ cuntarapāṇṭiya tevariṟai
yiliyāka tantu tiruvāḻikkallum nāṭṭi tā
ṅkaḷ Aṉupavittu ponta Oṉpatiṉ kalaṉe
tūṇivitai Aṭicārmaynil nilam Eḻumāvum Eppeṟpaṭṭa
Upātikkumuḷpaṭa muṉpu Aiyyaṉāḷil tiruvā
ḻikallum ṉāṭṭi tāṅkaḷ Aṉupavittu po
ntapaṭiyile nāmu Iṟaiilliyāka tantom I
ppaṭikku Ivvolaippiṭipāṭākak koṇṭu candrāditya
varai celvatākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇ
ṭu Aṉupavittup potuka 2 yāṇṭu 3 100 2 100 5 10 7
Ivaiḷḷakkāṭi Uṭaiyāreḻuttu § Ivai Partly incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.232 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
